hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$'; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); PROTECTED=('.env' '.env.local' 'package-lock.json'); for p in "${PROTECTED[@]}"; do if echo "$FILE" | grep -qF "$p"; then echo "Blocked: $FILE is protected" >&2; exit 2; fi; done; exit 0
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet || (git add -A && git commit -m "auto: session checkpoint [skip ci]" && git push 2>/dev/null || true)
